ingredients.name: East Deck Bridge
ingredients.description: East Deck Bridge (イーストデッキ) — local bridge in Tokyo, near Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden and Robert Indiana Sculpture: "LOVE". Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: This bridge near Shinjuku Southern Terrace appears in Chapter 3, where adult Takaki crosses it during his daily commute, a routine that mirrors the emotional distance he feels from his past.

ingredients.entityContext: Sangubashi Station and its surrounding streets in Yoyogi appear in Chapter 3 as part of Takaki's everyday Tokyo life, used to depict the mundane yet melancholic rhythm of his adult years.

ingredients.entityContext: Musashi-Urawa Station is one of the stations along the train route Takaki travels in Chapter 1 on his epic snow-delayed journey to see Akari in Tochigi, a train ride that becomes the film's most iconic sequence.

ingredients.name: Nisshindo Wagashi Store
ingredients.address: 37 Iwafunemachi Shizuka, Tochigi, 329-4307, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This traditional confectionery shop in Iwafune, Tochigi is the model for the shop near Akari's hometown where Takaki arrives after his long delayed train journey, culminating in their reunion under the cherry blossoms.

ingredients.address: 1571-5 Nokan, Nakatane, Kumage District, Kagoshima 891-3601, Japan

ingredients.name: Shinjuku Station
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-38-1 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shinjuku Station is the site of the film's most devastating final scene, where Takaki and Akari nearly pass each other at a railroad crossing. Akari walks away, letting go of the past forever.

ingredients.name: FLOTO
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒151-0053 Tokyo, Shibuya, Yoyogi, 4 Chome−12−6 Cala参宮橋

ingredients.name: West Deck

ingredients.entityContext: The West Deck pedestrian bridge near Shinjuku Southern Terrace is a confirmed scene location from Chapter 3, where Takaki is depicted walking through his daily adult life surrounded by crowds yet utterly alone.

ingredients.name: Oyama Station, platform 12,13
ingredients.address: 3 Chome Shiroyamacho, Oyama, Tochigi, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Oyama Station in Tochigi is a key stop on Takaki's Chapter 1 train journey to Akari. The film faithfully recreates the platform where his train waits during the snowstorm, stretching what should be a short ride into an agonizing night.

ingredients.entityContext: This convenience store on Tanegashima appears in Chapter 2 'Cosmonaut', representing the quiet everyday life of the island where Kanae grows up watching rockets and silently pining for Takaki.

ingredients.name: Nakayama coast
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒891-3604 Kagoshima, Kumage District, Nakatane, Noma
ingredients.entityContext: Nakayama coast on Tanegashima is the sweeping beach where Kanae surfs and where she and Takaki share moments together in Chapter 2 'Cosmonaut', with the launch facilities visible on the horizon, a setting Shinkai painted with extraordinary beauty.

ingredients.entityContext: Sangubashi Park in the Yoyogi neighborhood is a background location used in Chapter 3 to ground adult Takaki's Tokyo life in the Shinjuku-adjacent residential streets where Shinkai himself lived.
